planContent:
# 🏗️ Architecture Blueprint

## App Overview
A modern, professional SaaS landing page for a company management platform that showcases key features, pricing tiers, and customer testimonials. The page converts visitors through clear value propositions, interactive feature demonstrations, and frictionless call-to-action flows. Built as a single-file responsive experience with smooth animations and a premium dark theme aesthetic.

## Core Features
- **Hero Section**: Eye-catching headline, subheading, dual CTA buttons (Get Started, Watch Demo), and animated background gradient
- **Feature Cards Grid**: 6–8 feature cards with icons, titles, descriptions, and hover animations displaying core platform capabilities
- **Interactive Feature Tabs**: Tabbed interface showcasing 3–4 major product features with descriptions and mockup imagery (placeholder or SVG)
- **Pricing Table**: 3 pricing tiers (Starter, Professional, Enterprise) with features checklist, price display, and tier-specific CTA buttons
- **Customer Testimonials Carousel**: 5–6 rotating testimonial cards with customer avatar, name, role, company, and review text
- **FAQ Accordion**: 8–10 collapsible FAQ items addressing common questions about the product, pricing, and onboarding
- **Trust Indicators Section**: Display logos of "featured in" partners, user count badge, and uptime guarantee
- **Email Capture Modal**: Triggered on exit-intent or after scrolling 40% of page; email input with validation and success confirmation
- **Sticky Navigation Bar**: Fixed header with logo, nav links, and mobile hamburger menu that collapses on scroll
- **Footer**: Company links, social media icons, legal links, and Forge branding

## UI & Layout Strategy
- **Layout type**: Single-column vertically stacked sections with full-width hero, grids for features, and centered content blocks
- **Header**: 
  - Logo on left (40×40px)
  - Navigation links center-aligned (Home, Features, Pricing, FAQ, Contact)
  - "Login" button on right
  - Mobile: hamburger menu icon that toggles off-canvas navigation
  - Fixed at top with subtle shadow (drop-shadow-lg), backdrop blur (backdrop-blur-sm), semi-transparent background (bg-neutral-950/80)
  
- **Main content area**:
  - **Hero**: Full-viewport height (min-h-screen), centered text, headline (48px desktop / 32px mobile), subheading (20px), two stacked CTAs below
  - **Features Section**: Grid of 6 cards (3×2 on desktop, 1×6 stacked on mobile), each card has icon (48×48px), title, description, and hover lift effect
  - **Feature Tabs**: Three tabs (Operations, Analytics, Collaboration) with content area below, active tab underlined in blue-600
  - **Pricing**: 3-column grid (desktop) / single-column stack (mobile) with card elevation on hover
  - **Testimonials**: Horizontal carousel using arrow navigation buttons or auto-scroll every 5 seconds
  - **FAQ**: Accordion list with chevron icons that rotate on expand
  - **Email Modal**: Centered overlay with semi-transparent backdrop (bg-neutral-950/50), white form card, close button (×) in top-right
  - **Footer**: 4-column layout (desktop) / stacked (mobile) with links, social icons, copyright

- **Controls**:
  - All buttons: minimum 44×44px touch target, rounded-lg corners, Tailwind transition-all duration-300
  - Primary CTA buttons: bg-blue-600 text-white hover:bg-blue-700
  - Secondary buttons: bg-neutral-800 text-neutral-100 hover:bg-neutral-700 border-2 border-neutral-600
  - Form inputs: bg-neutral-900 border-2 border-neutral-700 focus:border-blue-600 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600/50 rounded-lg px-4 py-2
  - Tab triggers: cursor-pointer, text-neutral-400 hover:text-neutral-100, border-b-2 border-transparent data-active:border-blue-600
  - Accordion headers: w-full text-left py-3 px-4 hover:bg-neutral-900 flex justify-between items-center
  - Close button (×): 32×32px, top-right corner, cursor-pointer, opacity-60 hover:opacity-100

- **Footer**: 
  - Forge branded footer with dark theme, multiple link sections, social icons, copyright year, and "Built with Forge" badge
  - Layout: grid-cols-4 (desktop) / grid-cols-1 (mobile)

- **Design System**: 
  - Strict Tailwind CSS utility classes only
  - Spacing: 4px unit base (p-4, m-8, gap-6, etc.)
  - Typography: font-sans (Inter assumed), font-bold for headers, font-normal for body
  - No custom CSS; all styling via Tailwind

- **Color scheme** (FORGE dark theme):
  - Background: bg-neutral-950 (primary), bg-neutral-900 (secondary surfaces)
  - Text: text-neutral-100 (primary), text-neutral-400 (secondary)
  - Accent: bg-blue-600, text-blue-600
  - Borders: border-neutral-700 (default), border-blue-600 (active/focus)
  - Hover: bg-neutral-800, bg-neutral-700 (layered darkening)

- **Responsive strategy**:
  - **Mobile Portrait (375px)**:
    - Single-column layout throughout
    - Hero height: 60vh, headline 32px, subheading 16px
    - Feature grid: 1 column
    - Pricing cards: full-width stacked
    - Testimonials: single card visible, arrow buttons below
    - Hamburger menu opens off-canvas nav from right side (w-64)
    - Font sizes reduced by 1–2 steps
    - Padding/margins reduced by ~30%
  - **Desktop (1440px)**:
    - Hero: min-h-screen, headline 48px
    - Feature grid: 3 columns
    - Pricing: 3 columns side-by-side
    - Testimonials: carousel with 3 visible cards
    - Full navigation bar visible
    - Padding/margins at full scale

- **Animations & UX**:
  - Hero gradient: `animate-gradient` or CSS `background-size: 200% 200%` with 15s animation loop (shimmer effect)
  - Feature cards: `hover:scale-105 hover:shadow-xl transition-all duration-300`
  - Buttons: `hover:shadow-lg active:scale-95 transition-all duration-200`
  - Testimonial carousel: fade transition every 5 seconds or on arrow click
  - Accordion expand: `max-h-0 overflow-hidden transition-max-h duration-300` → `max-h-96`
  - Tab switch: opacity fade `opacity-0 → opacity-100` via `transition-opacity duration-200`
  - Sticky nav entrance: fade-in-down on load, subtle shadow-md
  - Modal backdrop: fade-in `opacity-0 → opacity-100` on trigger

- **Touch Targets**: 
  - All buttons: min-h-12 min-w-12 (48px), padded generously (px-6 py-3 for most)
  - Form inputs: h-12 minimum
  - Tab headers: min-h-10 with generous padding
  - Navigation links: py-2 px-4

- **Accessibility**:
  - All buttons and links: `aria-label` attributes
  - Form inputs: `<label for="...">` paired with input `id`
  - Accordion headers: `aria-expanded` attribute toggled on click, `aria-controls="panel-id"`
  - Modal: `role="dialog"` aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="modal-title"`, focus trap on open
  - Tabs: `role="tablist"`, `role="tab" aria-selected="true/false" aria-controls="panel-id"`
  - Images: `alt` attributes
  - Color contrast: Maintain WCAG AA minimum (text-neutral-100 on bg-neutral-950 = 13:1 contrast)
  - Focus rings: All interactive elements receive `focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:outline-none`

## Data Model & State
| Variable | Type | Default | Description |
|----------|------|---------|-------------|
| activeTab | String | "operations" | Currently selected feature tab (operations, analytics, collaboration) |
| testimonialIndex | Number | 0 | Current testimonial card displayed in carousel |
| expandedFaqId | String \| null | null | ID of currently expanded FAQ accordion item |
| modalOpen | Boolean | false | Whether email capture modal is visible |
| emailInput | String | "" | User-entered email in modal or footer |
| emailError | String | "" | Validation error message for email field |
| navOpen | Boolean | false | Whether mobile hamburger menu is open |
| scrollPosition | Number | 0 | Current page scroll position (for exit-intent logic) |
| emailSubmitted | Boolean | false | Whether email has been successfully captured |

- **Persistence Strategy**: 
  - Email captures: `window.forge.db.set("emails", uuid(), {email, timestamp, source})` on submit
  - No API calls required; all data stored locally via Forge persistence
  - Load testimonials, pricing, FAQ data as hardcoded JS arrays in component state (no fetch needed)
  - On page load, check `window.forge.db.get("emails")` to populate count badge if desired

## Technical Stack & Libraries
- **Required CDNs**: 
  - Tailwind CSS v3: `https://cdn.tailwindcss.com`
  - Lucide Icons (SVG icons): `https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lucide@latest`
- **Allowed**: Tailwind CSS, Lucide Icons only
- **APIs**: None (100% offline, static content)

## Implementation Steps

1. **Step 1**: Create single HTML file with `<!DOCTYPE html>`, `<head>` metadata (charset, viewport, title), Tailwind CDN link, and empty `<body>`

2. **Step 2**: Build fixed sticky navigation bar component with logo, nav links (Home, Features, Pricing, FAQ, Contact), Login button, and mobile hamburger icon; add `hidden` class to mobile nav initially and wire hamburger to toggle `navOpen` state

3. **Step 3**: Create full-viewport hero section with centered headline ("Manage Your Company Smarter"), subheading ("Unified platform for operations, analytics, and collaboration"), and two CTA buttons (Get Started → email modal, Watch Demo → scroll to features); add animated background gradient using Tailwind `from-blue-900/20 to-neutral-950`

4. **Step 4**: Build 6-card feature grid (3×2 desktop, 1×6 mobile) below hero, each card containing Lucide icon (48px), title, description, and `hover:scale-105 transition-all` effect; use `gap-6` and `grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3` for responsive layout

5. **Step 5**: Implement 3-tab feature showcase section with Operations, Analytics, Collaboration tabs; wire tabs to `activeTab` state with click handlers; swap content below tabs using `opacity-0/100 transition-opacity` fade effect based on `activeTab` value

6. **Step 6**: Create 3-column pricing table (desktop) / stacked (mobile) with cards for Starter ($29/mo), Professional ($99/mo), Enterprise (custom); each tier has feature checklist, CTA button (different color for Professional tier), and `hover:shadow-xl` lift effect

7. **Step 7**: Build testimonial carousel with 5–6 customer testimonial cards (avatar placeholder, name, role, company, review text); implement next/prev arrow buttons that cycle through `testimonialIndex` state; add auto-rotate every 5 seconds using `setInterval`

8. **Step 8**: Create FAQ accordion with 10 questions; each item has header (question + chevron icon) and collapsible body (answer); wire headers to toggle `expandedFaqId` and rotate chevron icon based on expanded state; use `max-h-0 overflow-hidden transition-max-h` for smooth collapse animation

9. **Step 9**: Add trust indicators section with placeholder logos grid, user count badge ("10,000+ teams manage operations"), uptime guarantee ("99.9% uptime SLA"), and social proof text

10. **Step 10**: Build email capture modal triggered on exit-intent (when `scrollPosition` approaches bottom) or after 40% scroll depth; modal contains email input field with validation (basic email regex), submit button, success message on submit, and close (×) button; wire to `window.forge.db.set()` on success

11. **Step 11**: Create footer with 4 sections (Product, Company, Legal, Social) in 4-column grid desktop / stacked mobile; include Forge branding badge at bottom, copyright year, and social media icon links

12. **Step 12**: Wire all event listeners (click, scroll, input, keydown for Enter key submission); add scroll listener to update `scrollPosition` and trigger modal at threshold; add click outside modal to close

13. **Step 13**: Apply full Tailwind styling: dark theme colors (bg-neutral-950, text-neutral-100), blue-600 accents, proper spacing (p-6, m-8, gap-4), border-neutral-700 dividers, rounded-lg corners on all cards/inputs

14. **Step 14**: Implement responsive breakpoints: test at 375px (mobile) and 1440px (desktop); adjust font sizes (text-2xl → text-4xl), grid columns (grid-cols-1 → grid-cols-3), padding, and layout hiding (hidden md:block)

15. **Step 15**: Add animation classes: `animate-gradient` for hero, `hover:scale-105 transition-all` for cards, `transition-opacity` for tab switches, `transition-max-h` for accordion, chevron rotation via `rotate-180` class toggle; test all interactions and ensure smooth performance

## Edge Cases & Error Handling

- **Empty email input**: Display error "Please enter a valid email" in red text (text-red-500); prevent submission if email is empty or invalid regex
- **Invalid email format**: Regex validation `/^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/`; show error message and keep modal open
- **Duplicate email submission**: Check `window.forge.db.get("emails")` for existing email; warn user "This email is already on our list" but allow re-submission with updated timestamp
- **Modal already shown once**: Add `sessionStorage.setItem("modalShown", "true")` after first submission in session; only show modal once per session unless user manually closes
- **Slow carousel on mobile**: Reduce auto-scroll interval from 5s to 8s on mobile (detect via `window.innerWidth < 768`)
- **Exit-intent on mobile**: Disable exit-intent modal trigger on touch devices (detect via `navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0`) to avoid accidental triggers
- **Accordion rapid clicks**: Add `disabled` state to prevent multiple rapid toggles; set `disabled` for 300ms after click
- **Browser without localStorage fallback**: If `window.forge.db` unavailable, gracefully degrade to in-memory state only; email captures still submitted but not persisted
- **No JavaScript**: Page remains semantic HTML; buttons have no-op fallbacks, links are standard `<a>` tags
- **Scroll jank on older devices**: Use `will-change: transform` on animated elements; lazy-load testimonial carousel images if future enhancement

## 🏷️ Smart Title Suggestions
- ⭐ **OperaHub** — Unified platform for smart company management workflows
- **CommandBase** — Centralized operations, analytics, and team collaboration  
- **FlowSync** — Integrated company management built for modern teams
